text.title: Validation Paralysis Breaker Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Validation Paralysis Breaker application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Validation MUST end within 72 hours of budget_start; budget overrun forces park.
Spec MUST name a single observable that would falsify the hypothesis; un-falsifiable hypotheses rejected.
At budget end, verdict MUST be ship | park | extend-once; 'continue' is forbidden.
rule.rationale: 'Continue' is the paralysis anti-pattern in disguise.

rule.statement: Extension is allowed exactly ONCE per hypothesis; second extension auto-parks.
rule.rationale: Multiple extensions are paralysis in a different costume.

rule.statement: Decision-record MUST name the risk being taken by shipping (or carried by parking).
rule.rationale: Un-named risks are the ones that bite.
